instruction:
Write a complete testthat test file for `glue::glue_data_col`.

Package: glue v1.8.0.9000
Description: Interpreted String Literals
Function: glue_data_col
Parameters: .x, .envir, .na, .literal
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_identical

Function Code:
```r
glue_data_col <- function(.x, ..., .envir = parent.frame(), .na = "NA", .literal = FALSE) {
  glue_data(.x, ..., .envir = .envir, .na = .na, .literal = .literal, .transformer = color_transformer)
}
```

Requirements:
1. Use test_that() blocks with descriptive names that reference `glue_data_col`
2. Test basic functionality using appropriate expectations (expect_identical)
3. Test edge cases: NULL input, empty strings, missing arguments
4. Test error conditions with expect_error()
5. Each test_that() block should test one logical behavior
